name: rename_partitions_remove_new
description: After table swap, rename all partitions of prow_job_run_tests to remove the '_new' prefix
query: DO $$ DECLARE old_prefix text := 'prow_job_run_tests_new'; tbl text := 'prow_job_run_tests'; r RECORD; new_name text; BEGIN FOR r IN WITH RECURSIVE partition_tree AS ( SELECT c.oid, c.relname FROM pg_class c JOIN pg_namespace n ON n.oid = c.relnamespace WHERE c.relname = tbl AND n.nspname = 'public' UNION ALL SELECT child.oid, child.relname FROM pg_inherits i JOIN pg_class child ON child.oid = i.inhrelid JOIN partition_tree pt ON pt.oid = i.inhparent ) SELECT relname FROM partition_tree WHERE relname != tbl AND relname LIKE old_prefix || '%' ORDER BY length(relname) DESC LOOP new_name := tbl || substring(r.relname FROM length(old_prefix) + 1); EXECUTE format('ALTER TABLE %I RENAME TO %I', r.relname, new_name); RAISE NOTICE 'Renamed % to %', r.relname, new_name; END LOOP; END $$
